name: Central Detroit Christian
description_short: Unable to verify company details. Website returns 403 Forbidden error, preventing access to service information needed for accurate profiling.
description_long: Central Detroit Christian is listed as a free-help organization in the Detroit area, suggesting it may operate as a non-profit or faith-based entity offering financial assistance or counseling services. However, the company's website (https://centraldetroitchristian.org) is currently inaccessible, returning a 403 Forbidden error that prevents verification of its actual services, credentials, and operational details. Without access to the website content, it is impossible to confirm whether the organization is HUD-approved, NFCC-certified, offers credit counseling, housing assistance, financial literacy programs, or other typical free-help services. The 403 error suggests either a server misconfiguration, access restrictions, or potential site availability issues. Consumers seeking information about this organization should attempt to contact them directly via phone, email, or in-person to verify their services, any certifications held, whether counseling is truly free or donation-based, and their current operational status. The inaccessible website is a significant red flag for verification purposes.
